account_profile.purpose: scan-engine training corpus — single composite account
regions_covered: international travel touchpoints (UK, EU via Wise, MX via Remitly)
account_profile.currency_convention: All amounts in USD-equivalent. Foreign-origin transactions include 'FX <CURRENCY> <NATIVE_AMOUNT> @ <RATE>' in the descriptor.
account_profile.variance_notes: This run leans Pacific Northwest US (Portland/Beaverton) with Western Canada travel (Calgary/Banff/Vancouver), international trip to London UK, mixed W-2 + gig + side-business + rental income, family-of-four demographic flavor. Fraud emphasis: card-testing + spoofed merchants (NETFLIIX, AMAZ0N) + geo-jump. Subscription emphasis: trial→paid (Tidal), price increase (Tidal Jan 2026), pause/resume (HBO Max), family plan split (T-Mobile).
